summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dark Hero Card + Next Actions Refactor (iteration 223). All 12 features verified: 1) Dark hero card (navy gradient) rendered at top for Emory, 2) Emory NOT in 'Next actions' section (no duplication), 3) No 'Act now' section label exists, 4) 'NEXT ACTIONS (2)' shows Stanford and Florida only, 5) Hero card has all required elements (school name, timing badge, stage context, status, action, 'View school →' CTA, context line), 6) Hero card data-testid follows pattern hero-priority-card-{program_id}, 7) 'What changed since your last update' card visible above hero, 8) 'Keep things moving' and 'Just keep an eye' sections present, 9) Hero card click navigates to /pipeline/{program_id}, 10) Next actions cards navigate to correct school, 11) Mobile responsive at 390px - school name NOT truncated, 12) Priority/Pipeline toggle works (Kanban view).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark Hero Card + Next Actions Refactor testing complete (iteration 223). Key changes verified in PriorityBoard.js: 1) New HeroPriorityCard component with dark navy gradient (linear-gradient(135deg, #0f1c35 0%, #152547 50%, #1a2d5a 100%)), 2) PriorityBoard filters heroItem from high list to prevent duplication, 3) Section label changed from 'Act now' to 'Next actions', 4) Hero card has data-testid='hero-priority-card-{program_id}', 5) Flow: Context (What changed) → Hero (Emory) → Next actions (Stanford, Florida) → Keep things moving (UCLA) → Just keep an eye (Creighton). All navigation and mobile responsiveness working correctly.
